deploy.startCommand: echo '>>> step: migrate'; python manage.py migrate --noinput; echo '>>> step: superuser'; python manage.py createsuperuser --noinput </dev/null 2>&1 || echo '>>> superuser skipped'; echo ">>> step: gunicorn on port $PORT"; exec gunicorn config.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 2 --timeout 30 --access-logfile -
